extra.reason: Completed: added xtrm.wtf branding, isolated /gitboard/design-preview route, applied grounded Westworld-style FUI to live Gitboard, improved PR inline conversation/detail view, fixed GitHub token data hydration in Podman, and documented follow-up work in session report.

Done: added compact xtrm console repo rail backed by /api/console/repos; selection filters Git module and passes Beads project selection into Beadboard iframe.

Done: Beadboard is mounted as /console/beads inside the shared xtrm shell via module iframe, with selected Beads project passed through URL and existing feed/board functionality preserved.
Done: legacy /gitboard and /beadboard routes remain mounted and functional while /console routes serve the unified shell.
Done: PR expansion detects bead IDs across PR body/detail conversation and shows linked bead chips; Bead issue dossier detects PR refs/URLs in title/description/notes and shows linked PR chips.

Done: fixed console visual inconsistency by embedding Beadboard without its internal topbar/project rail, passing selected project from the shared rail, removing Beads feed padding, and forcing shared #181818 module background.
Done: forced Beadboard embedded mode when framed and added no-store headers to production dashboard HTML/assets so stale cached UI cannot mask console changes.
Done: rolled application source back to pre-console state, removed /console route/component files, rebuilt dashboards, and restarted preview with /gitboard and /beadboard functional.
Done: documented xtrm Console Minimal FUI visual contract with tokens, shell, row/dossier anatomy, banned patterns, and migration guardrails.
Done: normalized Gitboard and Beadboard dashboard tokens to the visual contract without route or component behavior changes; both dashboard builds pass.
